## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the related issue: Fixes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested this change locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated (regression test for bug fixes)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / CHANGELOG) — or no docs affected
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and are signed off (DCO)
